title: Best boy
wikitext:
[]: The "Shinji is Mah Waifu" thread.             Quote Post by Grimmjow » Sun Mar 27, 2011 3:21 pm For all you Shinji lovers out there, here is your thread. Now feel free to tear yourself apart as you strive to make Shinji your pure Waifu.

[]:             Quote Post by Reichu » Sun Mar 27, 2011 3:46 pm Shinji (stern face): But... I'm a boy.

[]:             Quote Post by Grimmjow » Sun Mar 27, 2011 3:46 pm Reichu wrote: Shinji (stern face): But... I'm a boy.

[]:             Quote Post by Light » Sun Mar 27, 2011 3:52 pm Shinji would make a great housewife.

[]:             Quote Post by Grimmjow » Sun Mar 27, 2011 3:54 pm Light wrote: Shinji would make a great housewife.

[]:             Quote Post by rhfxz1s » Sun Mar 27, 2011 3:54 pm You know, in all my time spent lurking the internet I can't say I've seen many (if any, now that I think about it) people who claimed Shinji as a waifu/husbando/etc. The poor guy just isn't loved I guess.

[]:             Quote Post by Xard » Sun Mar 27, 2011 3:57 pm rhfxz1s wrote: You know, in all my time spent lurking the internet I can't say I've seen many (if any, now that I think about it) people who claimed Shinji as a waifu/husbando/etc. The poor guy just isn't loved I guess.

[]:             Quote Post by Sachi » Sun Mar 27, 2011 3:58 pm inb4 SSD finds this thread.

[]:             Quote Post by Tankred » Sun Mar 27, 2011 4:01 pm What is this I don't even...

[]:             Quote Post by Light » Sun Mar 27, 2011 4:02 pm Grimmjow wrote: His children would be deeply disturbed, but a waifu is a waifu.

[]:             Quote Post by esselfortium » Sun Mar 27, 2011 4:10 pm Light wrote: The fact that he got Asuka to like him to some extent is a mystery unresolved.

[]:             Quote Post by Reichu » Sun Mar 27, 2011 4:10 pm The cross-pollination with /a/ is rather out of hand, so I'm going to shoot this thread dead. One small step toward the betterment of all!

[]:             Quote Post by Sailor Star Dust » Wed Mar 30, 2011 11:56 am Sachi wrote: inb4 SSD finds this thread.

[]: Best boy             Quote Post by Snow » Sun Apr 02, 2017 9:38 pm Now, since the mid-90's there has been a constant state of a information war over the identity of the legendary best girl. Now, i'd like to ask you who is the best boy, since i do not see too much debate on this topic. Personally, Fuyutsuki best boy, heavens bless.

[]: Re: Best boy             Quote Post by DarkBluePhoenix » Mon Apr 03, 2017 12:48 am I can't choose between Fuyutsuki and Kaji. A conundrum to be sure. Both have their merits, and detractors, but no one's perfect, so for me it's a tie.

[]: Re: Best boy             Quote Post by Snow » Mon Apr 03, 2017 1:05 am DarkBluePhoenix wrote: I can't choose between Fuyutsuki and Kaji. A conundrum to be sure. Both have their merits, and detractors, but no one's perfect, so for me it's a tie.

[]: Re: Best boy             Quote Post by DarkBluePhoenix » Mon Apr 03, 2017 1:12 am ^ Sorry, that is what I meant. My tired brain sometimes makes things convoluted when in this state. But is there even a character that has no flaws in this show? I mean, Pen-Pen is the best candidate, am I right?

[]: Re: Best boy             Quote Post by Snow » Mon Apr 03, 2017 1:15 am DarkBluePhoenix wrote: ^ Sorry, that is what I meant. My tired brain sometimes makes things convoluted when in this state. But is there even a character that has no flaws in this show? I mean, Pen-Pen is the best candidate, am I right?

[]: Re: Best boy             Quote Post by NemZ » Mon Apr 03, 2017 2:43 am Gendo is the Byronic hero the eva world truly deserves.

[]: Re: Best boy             Quote Post by KingXanaduu » Mon Apr 03, 2017 3:24 am You guys already know my answer by now, if there's any doubt: Shinji Ikari. This is a kid since day one has been deliberately been manipulated to failure and screwed by nearly every facet of his life to the point of making it a living hell, where he pretty much had the one chance in his entire like to say "FUCK YOU" to everything that screwed him over. But yet, despite everything that happened to him, it was HE that decided that life was worth living and denied Instrumentality, even if his life up to that point was utter shit. THAT takes a strength that very few people have.

[]:             Quote Post by Reichu » Sun Mar 27, 2011 3:46 pm Shinji (stern face): But... I'm a boy.

[]:   &nbs
